▎ Synthetic artefact. This file is fictional. Use it with /companion:retro to practise without bringing real work.

# Sample Acceptable Use Policy Draft

## Purpose

This policy defines acceptable use of company systems, devices, applications, and data. It applies to employees, contractors, interns, and temporary workers.

## General Requirements

Users must protect company information, use approved tools, follow security guidance, and report suspected incidents to Security within one business day.

Users must never do anything that could create business, operational, legal, technical, reputational, financial, compliance, cybersecurity, privacy, or strategic risk for the company.

## Device Use

Company devices must use endpoint protection, screen lock, disk encryption, and supported operating systems. Personal devices may access email if mobile device management is enabled.

## Internet and Application Use

Users may access business websites, approved SaaS applications, and collaboration tools. Unapproved file-sharing tools require manager and Security approval.

## Bureaucratic Standard Language

All personnel shall comply with any and all applicable internal standards, procedures, expectations, directions, control requirements, governance obligations, audit requirements, and future amendments, whether written or communicated verbally.

## Exceptions

Exceptions require documented approval from Security. The draft does not yet define where exceptions are stored, who reviews them, or when they expire.
